headline: Kraken Revamps App with AI Tool by Q2

article.title: Kraken to overhaul app with AI investing assistant
article.summary: The redesigned app will use AI to recommend trades and tailor investing tools around users' financial goals as Kraken expands into broader financial services.

headline: Senate Probes Trump Crypto Links Amid $1B Market Rout

article.title: Senate Democrats call for hearings into Trump’s ties to crypto amid CLARITY Act discussions
article.summary: Five senators called for committee hearings to investigate US President Donald Trump’s policies potentially being influenced by crypto funding from United Arab Emirates-linked and other entities.

headline: Holtec Files $1B IPO Amid Sector Surge

article.title: Nuclear Energy Services Firm Holtec Joins Sector’s IPO Rush
article.summary: Holtec Nuclear Corp. filed for a US initial public offering, becoming the latest in the sector to try to capitalize on data centers’ growing power demands.

headline: Rhode Island Jail Operator Files $120M Bankruptcy

article.title: Rhode Island Jail Operator Files Bankruptcy to Cut Bond Debt
article.summary: Central Falls Detention Facility Corp., which houses federal detainees including people arrested by the US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agency, filed for bankruptcy saying it cannot afford to keep paying on more than $167 million in bond debt.

headline: Circle Gains OCC Nod for $1B National Trust Bank

article.title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
Circle won final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, allowing it to place USDC reserves under federal oversight and expanding its regulated digital asset custody business.

headline: $1B Trump Crypto Gains Spark Senate Probe Demand

article.title: Democrats Call for Senate Hearings on Trump's Massive Crypto Profits

article.title: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Dumps Nearly Half of BTC Holdings for $87 Million
article.summary: Nasdaq-listed Empery Digital said it sold 1,400 Bitcoin since May to help fuel an AI data center deal, legal bills, and other expenses.
